description: Style NoteNow give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of sandals from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles.Product DetailsCamel brown sandals with criss- cross forefoot and midfoot strapsAn ankle strap fastened by a velcro closureTextured and foamy footbedOutsole stitched to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with grooves and a pivot point on the toe regionMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
